title: Welcome to Dominion.io — Free forever. No login required. Just play.
Tip: Form alliances early — you're stronger together than alone.
Tip: Attack players with low troop counts on your border for fast expansion.
Tip: Use the Blitz ability at the right moment to turn the tide of battle.
Tip: Capturing a capital instantly takes all their territory.
Tip: Build supply hubs to keep distant territories well supplied.
Climb the leaderboard — stats are tracked for logged-in players.
Choose your flag from 623 flags spanning ancient empires to modern nations.
4 game modes: Classic, Blitz, Team Domination, and Cold War.
